name: Omni-tool
descs: When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 12 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)

When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 9 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)

When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 6 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)
